intro: Xanthostemon gugerlii, also known as the Queensland Fraser Island Xanthostemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The bioactive constituents of Xanthostemon gugerlii include flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Xanthostemon gugerlii is commonly used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever and skin conditions.
